name: Mincemeat Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and brown sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs, molasses, sweetened condensed milk, water, and mince meat to the creamed mixture. Mix well.
3. In a separate bowl, sift together flour, salt, and baking powder.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
5. Fold in the rolled oats.
6. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 410°F (205°C) for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown and firm to the touch.
